CVE-2021-28963.title: Shibboleth Service Provider before 3.2.1 allows content injection ...
CVE-2021-28963.summary: Shibboleth Service Provider before 3.2.1 allows content injection because template generation uses attacker-controlled parameters.

CVE-2021-31826.title: Shibboleth Service Provider 3.x before 3.2.2 is prone to a NULL p ...
CVE-2021-31826.summary: Shibboleth Service Provider 3.x before 3.2.2 is prone to a NULL pointer dereference flaw involving the session recovery feature. The flaw is exploitable (for a daemon crash) on systems not using this feature if a crafted cookie is supplied.
